digest.en: Iran says it won't reopen the Strait of Hormuz as long as the U.S. blockade remains. The U.S. Navy Secretary was fired by the Pentagon amid escalating tensions. Iranian forces claim to have seized two ships near the Strait of Hormuz after Trump extended a truce.
digest.hi: मणिपुर हिंसा में 58 हजार से अधिक लोग विस्थापित हुए हैं और 217 की मौत हो चुकी है। चुराचांदपुर में एक विधायक की मौत के बाद बंद की घोषणा की गई है। लुफ्थांसा समूह ने ईंधन संकट की चिंता बढ़ने पर 20 हजार उड़ानों में कटौती करने का फैसला किया है।

articles.title: Iran says won't reopen Hormuz as long as U.S. blockade remains
articles.summary: Iran seized two ships attempting to cross the Strait of Hormuz and has not decided on joining new US talks. Iran Guards say 'seized' two ships attempting to cross Strait of Hormuz; Iran says it has yet to decide whether to join a new round of talks with the U. S.

articles.title: Iran Says Won't Reopen Hormuz As Long As US Blockade Remains
articles.summary: Iran will not reopen the Strait of Hormuz while a US blockade remains in place. Iran said that reopening the Strait of Hormuz is not possible. Iran Says Won't Reopen Hormuz As Long As US Blockade Remains.

articles.title: U.S. Navy Secretary John Phelan fired by Pentagon
articles.summary: US Navy Secretary John Phelan was fired by the Pentagon. Mr. Phelan's departure also comes just weeks after Defence Secretary Pete Hegseth fired the Army's top officer, Gen. Randy George, as well as two other top generals in the Army.

articles.title: Reported Seizure of Ships Injects New Uncertainty Over Peace Talks
articles.summary: Iran's Revolutionary Guards seized two ships near the Strait of Hormuz. Iran’s Revolutionary Guards said they had seized two ships near the Strait of Hormuz. A Trump spokeswoman said the president did not view those actions as violating the cease-fire.

articles.title: Iranian Forces Claim to Seize 2 Ships Near Strait of Hormuz After Trump Extends Truce
articles.summary: Iranian forces seized two ships near the Strait of Hormuz after Trump extended a truce. Iran War Live Updates: Iranian Forces Claim to Seize 2 Ships Near Strait of Hormuz After Trump Extends Truce The New York Times.

articles.title: 5 Lebanese Killed In Israeli Strikes As Lebanon Seeks Truce Extension
articles.summary: Israeli strikes killed 5 Lebanese as Lebanon seeks a truce extension. The 10-day ceasefire, which expires Sunday, was announced after an initial meeting last week. 5 Lebanese Killed In Israeli Strikes As Lebanon Seeks Truce Extension.

articles.title: Three Ships Attacked in Strait of Hormuz, Escorting Two to Its Coast
articles.summary: Three ships were attacked in the Strait of Hormuz, with two escorted to the Iranian coast. The incident occurred in a vital waterway for global oil shipments. Authorities are investigating the attacks.

articles.title: Iran says Strait of Hormuz cannot be opened due to ceasefire breaches
articles.summary: Iran cited ceasefire breaches as the reason the Strait of Hormuz cannot be opened. Iran says Strait of Hormuz cannot be opened due to ceasefire breaches BBC.

articles.title: US Navy Secretary Quits Trump Administration Amid Hormuz Blockade
articles.summary: US Navy Secretary Phelan quit the Trump administration amid the Hormuz blockade. His departure follows the firing of Gen. Randy George. Phelan's departure also comes just weeks after Hegseth fired the Army's top officer, Gen.

articles.title: Iran war news, Trump says there is ‘no time frame’ on Iran war and denies midterms driving decisions
articles.summary: Trump stated there is no time frame for a potential Iran war. He denied that midterm elections are driving his decisions. Live updates: Iran war news, Trump says there is ‘no time frame’ on Iran war and denies midterms driving decisions CNN.

articles.title: Iran Says Reopening Strait of Hormuz 'Not Possible' Under US Naval Blockade
articles.summary: Iran has stated it cannot reopen the Strait of Hormuz under a US naval blockade. The statement comes after the US-Iran conflict began on February 28. US-Iran war broke out on February 28.

articles.title: To Iran, Trump Blinked First by Extending the Cease-Fire
articles.summary: Iran's leaders believe they can outlast President Trump in a standoff, which could devastate average Iranians economically. Iran’s leaders believe that they can withstand an enduring standoff longer than President Trump.

articles.title: Two Resignations, Border Anger: Trouble Mounts For Nepal's New Government
articles.summary: Nepal's new government faces trouble with two resignations and border anger. Instability has rocked Balen Shah's government since he took office. Since Balen Shah took office, his government has been rocked by instability.

articles.title: Nepal Home Minister Sudan Gurung Resigns In Weeks Over Financial Transactions
articles.summary: Nepal Home Minister Sudan Gurung resigned over financial transactions. Gurung is the second minister to leave the new government. Nepal Home Minister Sudan Gurung Resigns In Weeks Over Financial Transactions.

articles.title: US Withholding Iraq’s Own Oil Money Over Ties to Iran
articles.summary: The US halted dollar shipments to Iraq's economy due to its ties to Iran. The money comes from Iraq's oil revenues. The United States has halted dollar shipments to Iraq’s cash-based economy in an effort to force the Baghdad government to distance itself from Iran.

articles.title: Billionaire backer sues Trump family's crypto firm over alleged extortion
articles.summary: Billionaire Justin Sun sued the Trump family's crypto firm over alleged extortion. He spent $45m on its tokens. Billionaire investor Justin Sun is suing the family's World Liberty crypto venture after spending $45m on its tokens.

articles.title: South Korean arrested outside Yasukuni Shrine ceremony for war dead
articles.summary: A South Korean national was arrested at Tokyo's Yasukuni Shrine for holding a banner with political messages during a ceremony for Japan's war dead. Japan's prime minister did not attend, but around 120 lawmakers did.

articles.title: Iran attacks 3 ships in the Strait of Hormuz as Trump indefinitely extends ceasefire
articles.summary: Iran attacked three ships in the Strait of Hormuz as Trump extended a ceasefire indefinitely. Live updates: Iran attacks 3 ships in the Strait of Hormuz as Trump indefinitely extends ceasefire AP News.

articles.title: EU unblocks €90 billion Ukraine loan after Hungary row
articles.summary: The EU is set to unblock a €90 billion loan to Ukraine after a row with Hungary. The loan's definitive sign-off is expected by Thursday, as Hungary waits for Russian oil to arrive through the Druzhba pipeline.

articles.title: Rs 86,816 crore Dubai Metro Gold Line project approved: 42 km underground network to be ready by
articles.summary: The Dubai Metro Gold Line project, valued at Rs 86,816 crore, has been approved. The 42 km underground network is expected to be ready soon. Rs 86,816 crore Dubai Metro Gold Line project approved: 42 km underground network to be ready by.

articles.title: Pope tells prisoners in Equatorial Guinea 'you are not alone'
articles.summary: Pope Leo visited prisoners in Equatorial Guinea, braving a heavy rainstorm, and told them "you are not alone". This was part of his four-nation Africa tour. Pope Leo's four-nation Africa tour has pushed towards ​a dramatic close, with the pontiff braving a heavy rainstorm to greet prisoners in Equatorial Guinea.

articles.title: ईरान ने कैसे हासिल की ड्रोन तकनीक में महारत
articles.summary: ईरान ने ड्रोन तकनीक में महारत हासिल की है, जिसका उपयोग दुश्मन की रक्षा व्यवस्था को थकाने और उनके बजट पर दबाव बनाने के लिए किया जा रहा है। ईरान इसी रणनीति के तहत अपने ड्रोन कार्यक्रम में निवेश करता रहा है।

hi.summary: ईरान ने ड्रोन तकनीक में महारत हासिल की है, जिसका उपयोग दुश्मन की रक्षा व्यवस्था को थकाने और उनके बजट पर दबाव बनाने के लिए किया जा रहा है। ईरान इसी रणनीति के तहत अपने ड्रोन कार्यक्रम में निवेश करता रहा है।

articles.title: ईरान ने तीन मालवाहक जहाज़ों पर हमले के बाद दो को ज़ब्त किया

articles.summary: अमेरिका-ईरान बातचीत में देरी हुई है। इस्लामाबाद में मंच तैयार है, लेकिन बातचीत करने वाले लोग अब तक नहीं पहुंचे हैं। ईरान अमेरिका से बातचीत को लेकर उत्साहित नहीं दिख रहा है।

articles.summary: अमेरिका-इज़रायल हमलों का 54वां दिन है। ईरान पर हमले जारी हैं और संघर्षविराम के बीच अविश्वास बढ़ रहा है। कूटनीति के बावजूद हमले जारी हैं। ईरान पर अमेरिका-इज़रायल हमलों का 54वां दिन: संघर्षविराम के बीच अविश्वास, हमले जारी और कूटनीति अनिश्चित The Wire - Hindi।

articles.title: ट्रंप बोले, 'मुनीर और शरीफ़' के कहने पर बढ़ाया सीज़फ़ायर, मंगलवार को वॉशिंगटन में क्या-क्या हुआ
articles.summary: राष्ट्रपति ट्रंप ने सीज़फ़ायर बढ़ाने की घोषणा की। यह घोषणा पाकिस्तान के प्रधानमंत्री इमरान खान और पूर्व प्रधानमंत्री नवाज शरीफ के कहने पर हुई है। वॉशिंगटन में वार्ता नहीं हो पाई।

articles.title: भारत ने संरा महासचिव पद की उम्मीदवार बाचेलेत से सुरक्षा परिषद सुधार के लक्ष्यों पर सवाल किए
articles.summary: भारत ने संयुक्त राष्ट्र महासचिव पद की उम्मीदवार बाचेलेत से सुरक्षा परिषद सुधार के लक्ष्यों पर सवाल किए। भारत ने उनसे उनकी प्राथमिकताओं और सुधार के तरीकों के बारे में जानकारी मांगी। यह सवाल भारत की सुरक्षा परिषद में सुधार की मांग को दर्शाता है।
